annotations.anchor_quote: Water, the lifeline of all life forms, has been treated mercilessly by the humankind. We have sacrificed it to an extent that it has increasingly become a finite resource. According to a report by World Health Organization (WHO), 1/3rd of the world's consumable water has been lost to human follies.
annotations.comment: Introduction gives background on scarcity but lacks explicit thesis and preview of main arguments; add one-sentence stance with structure outline.

annotations.anchor_quote: According to a report by World Health Organization (WHO), 1/3rd of the world's consumable water has been lost to human follies.
annotations.comment: WHO statistic unverifiable and not precisely attributed; cite reliable source or replace with accurate data.
